creator: royce@tycho.org
text:
There appears to be no way in pkg or pkg.conf to easily specify an alternate pkg server mirror.

The current pkg mirror system can handle full failure (with SRV records), but cannot currently handle partial failures (such as when the server is up, but critical files are missing).

Since these cases are probably rare, enabling a local workaround is desirable.

This was prompted by a 404 against ISC's mirror today for http://pkg.freebsd.org/FreeBSD:10:amd64/latest, while the overall mirror is still up and reachable:

# pkg update
Updating FreeBSD repository catalogue...
pkg: http://pkg.FreeBSD.org/FreeBSD:10:amd64/latest/meta.txz: Not Found
repository FreeBSD has no meta file, using default settings
pkg: http://pkg.FreeBSD.org/FreeBSD:10:amd64/latest/packagesite.txz: Not Found
Unable to update repository FreeBSD
